title: Goodbye to the Birds - club's captain jets off to join Richards Bay outfit
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The captain of the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The captain of the high-achieving Oriented Birds Football Club, Khanyisani "Mashesha" Radebe, has left the club to join the Richards Bay outfit, the Milford Football Club.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The captain of the high-achieving Oriented Birds Football Club, Khanyisani "Mashesha" Radebe, has left the club to join the Richards Bay outfit, the Milford Football Club."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Milford FC are currently playing in the Motsepe Foundation National First Division, the second tier in South African soccer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Professional ranks","html":"Professional ranks"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 29-year-old Radebe, a decorated player, will be playing in the professional ranks for the first time in his football career.","html":"The 29-year-old Radebe, a decorated player, will be playing in the professional ranks for the first time in his football career."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He told the Knysna-Plett Herald, before catching a flight to Durban, that after he had undergone trials at Milford in January, he received a call from the club's management, saying they wanted to sign him, and that he must make arrangements for this with the Birds' leadership."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""I feel happy about the move - getting this professional offer at this time after playing away from home (Durban) for four years," Radebe said.","html":""I feel happy about the move - getting this professional offer at this time after playing away from home (Durban) for four years," Radebe said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Offer came as 'shock'","html":"Offer came as 'shock'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said the offer had come as a "shock" to him, but "I'm very excited because they (Birds) handled it in a proper way and have allowed me to go and join Milford FC".","html":"He said the offer had come as a "shock" to him, but "I'm very excited because they (Birds) handled it in a proper way and have allowed me to go and join Milford FC"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""I want to say a special thank you to the people of the Garden Route for allowing me to express my football dream - I'll never forget the support I've received from them, from when I came down to the Eden region."","html":""I want to say a special thank you to the people of the Garden Route for allowing me to express my football dream - I'll never forget the support I've received from them, from when I came down to the Eden region.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Message to chairman","html":"Message to chairman"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Radebe said he also wanted to pass on a message to the chairman of Oriented Birds, Zitho Tyontwana: "I am forever grateful to you for everything you have shown me and done for me. I will always be a son to you."","html":"Radebe said he also wanted to pass on a message to the chairman of Oriented Birds, Zitho Tyontwana: "I am forever grateful to you for everything you have shown me and done for me. I will always be a son to you.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Thanks for memories'","html":"'Thanks for memories'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He added: "Last, but not least, I want to thank the entire Oriented Birds family for the time we've spent together, and for all the memories we've shared."","html":"He added: "Last, but not least, I want to thank the entire Oriented Birds family for the time we've spent together, and for all the memories we've shared.""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He sent the Birds team his best wishes, saying he felt sure they would achieve their goal of reaching the ABC Motsepe National playoffs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Radebe played for George's Simunye Football Club before joining the Birds.","html":"Radebe played for George's Simunye Football Club before joining the Birds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Banged in winning goal","html":"Banged in winning goal"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Saturday 15 February in the Bird's back yard, Plett's Kwanokuthula Stadium, he banged in the winning goal against the Central Karoo Region's Ubuntu Spartans, a fixture that the Birds won 1-0.","html":"On Saturday 15 February in the Bird's back yard, Plett's Kwanokuthula Stadium, he banged in the winning goal against the Central Karoo Region's Ubuntu Spartans, a fixture that the Birds won 1-0."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Saturday 1 March, without Radebe, the Birds, in the Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League, will lock horns with the struggling Infantry School team at the Military Base sportsground in Oudtshoorn.","html":"On Saturday 1 March, without Radebe, the Birds, in the Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League, will lock horns with the struggling Infantry School team at the Military Base sportsground in Oudtshoorn."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Birds are fighting for a playoff spot, while the Infantry team are at the bottom of the log.","html":"The Birds are fighting for a playoff spot, while the Infantry team are at the bottom of the log."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Goodbye to the Birds - club's captain jets off to join Richards Bay outfit
